name: loom_validate
description: Validate CMS JSON content against the typed CmsPage schema in PlausiDen-Loom. Lives in the Loom repo as the canonical typed-content gate; Forge calls it via `forge content validate` (see also forge_content_validate). Use this from the Loom side when iterating on the schema itself; use forge_content_validate from the Forge side when iterating on site content.

schema.description: Override schema path. Default: cms-schema.json in the current directory.

json.description: Emit JSON instead of human-readable text.
